response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in non-financial domains; while there is brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, it is outdated and unrelated to the required financial systems context, and SQL/Windows expertise is not substantiated.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Extensive DevOps and CI/CD exposure across multiple environments
concerns: No recent or relevant C++/Windows experience in capital markets
Lacks documented fixed income, investment banking, or financial derivatives domain knowledge
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in enterprise financial systems
